title: Scaffold React Native Expo Go app inside repository
goal: Create a React Native Expo app in MobileApp that can run in Expo Go.
implementation_steps: From the repository root, create a new Expo TypeScript app in MobileApp.
Use an Expo template compatible with Expo Go.
Install expo-router if not included by the template.
Create MobileApp/README.md with initial setup commands.
Ensure MobileApp has its own package.json.
Ensure MobileApp is independent from Backend/package.json.
Do not store real API keys in committed files.
acceptance_criteria: MobileApp folder exists at repo root.
MobileApp can install dependencies with npm install.
MobileApp can start with npx expo start.
Expo Go can open the app.
MobileApp/.env.example documents required API URL and API key.
out_of_scope: Do not implement auth screens in this task.
Do not implement QR scanner logic in this task.
Do not modify Laravel backend in this task.
